title: Metal Powder Sintering Furnace Profile Controller
description: Closed-loop furnace controller for sintering 316L stainless steel powder compacts. Executes a multi-segment temperature profile stored in EEPROM, controls a TRIAC furnace element via PID, manages protective N₂ atmosphere via solenoid valve, and enforces fault shutdown on thermocouple failure or overtemperature.
objective: Follow multi-segment sinter profile (ramp/dwell/cool); maintain ±5 °C of setpoint; auto-purge N₂ above 400 °C; fault-cut power on TC error or T > 1400 °C; log to serial.
constraints: Arduino Mega; TRIAC 230 V furnace; MAX31855; AT24C32 EEPROM; BOM < $60; single-phase 230 V power.
supporting_fact_titles: Powder Metallurgy Sintering Kinetics and Densification Modelling
design_element_titles: TRIAC Zero-Cross SCR Furnace Power Controller
N2 Purge Gas Solenoid Valve Module
element_usage_notes: Reads furnace temperature every 250 ms; checks internal fault flags each cycle
Duty cycle set by PID output; zero-cross firing minimises EMI
Opens solenoid when T > 400 °C; closes on fault or T < 200 °C cool-down
Profile loaded at setup; segment pointer advances when dwell time elapses
